question: Does the model explicitly state the final shortest total distance is 130 meters?
Does the model identify the optimal water-fetching position E as lying strictly on the riverbank segment CD?
Does the model correctly identify the geometric strategy of using reflection (symmetry) across the riverbank to linearize the path (e.g., referencing the 'Drinking Horse' problem)?
Does the reasoning correctly calculate the vertical leg of the constructed right triangle as 120m (derived from AC + BD = 70 + 50)?
Does the reasoning correctly identify the horizontal leg of the constructed right triangle as 50m (equal to the riverbank length CD)?
Does the model correctly apply the Pythagorean theorem (√120² + 50²) to calculate the final distance?
Does the generated image show the riverbank CD as a straight line with points A and B initially on the same side?
Does the generated image visually depict the reflection of a point (e.g., A' or B') on the opposite side of the riverbank CD?
Does the image show a straight line connecting the reflected point (e.g., A') to the other target point (e.g., B), intersecting the riverbank segment CD at point E?
If the reasoning relies on an auxiliary right triangle for calculation, is this triangle clearly depicted in the generated image?
Are the geometric constructions (perpendicular lines, right angles) visually accurate (e.g., perpendicular lines look 90 degrees)?
Is the reflected point visually symmetrical to the original point with respect to the riverbank (i.e., equal perpendicular distance to CD)?
Are all key points (A, B, C, D, E) and auxiliary points clearly labeled without visual clutter or ambiguity?
Does the image accurately reflect the textual description of the geometric construction (e.g., if text says 'connect A' to B', the image shows this segment)?
Are the visual proportions in the image consistent with the specific values in the text (e.g., AC appears longer than BD, and E appears closer to D than C)?
Are there no contradictions between the textual description of point locations/relationships and their visual representation in the generated images?
